name: [GRIDHAND] Internal Ops Agent - New employee → create accounts in all systems → send welcome

gridhand.scenario: New employee → create accounts in all systems → send welcome
gridhand.description: When a new employee is added to the company's payroll system, such as QuickBooks, on the first day of the month, our automation workflow is triggered to create accounts for the new hire in all relevant systems, including Gmail for email, Zoom for meetings, and Shopify for point-of-sale access, streamlining the onboarding process. This automated process takes place within 24 hours, ensuring the new employee has all necessary access and tools to start work immediately, and sends a personalized welcome email with login credentials and important company information to get them started. By having all accounts created and welcome messages sent automatically, the business owner can focus on training and integration, while the new employee can hit the ground running, resulting in increased productivity and a smoother onboarding experience.
